title.zh: 失眠食疗方：5种改善睡眠的药膳
title.en: Insomnia Dietary Therapy: 5 Medicinal Recipes for Better Sleep

description.zh: 介绍5种有效的失眠食疗方，通过日常饮食改善睡眠质量，远离失眠困扰
description.en: Five effective dietary therapy recipes for insomnia - improve sleep quality through daily diet

zh.text: 失眠是现代人常见的困扰，中医认为失眠多与心神不宁、肝火旺盛、脾胃不和等因素有关。通过食疗调理，可以从根本上改善睡眠质量。以下是5种有效的失眠食疗方：

items: 心神不宁：心血不足，心神失养
肝火旺盛：肝郁化火，扰动心神
脾胃不和：胃气不和，卧不安
阴虚火旺：阴液不足，虚火上炎
痰热扰心：痰热内扰，心神不安

zh.text: 功效：养心安神，适合心血不足型失眠。

zh.title: 百合莲子粥
zh.instructions:
1. 百合、莲子提前浸泡
2. 大米洗净加水煮粥
3. 加入百合、莲子继续煮
4. 煮至粘稠加冰糖调味
5. 每晚睡前1小时食用
6. 连续食用7-10天见效

zh.text: 功效：养肝宁心，适合肝血不足型失眠。

zh.title: 酸枣仁汤
zh.instructions:
1. 酸枣仁炒熟捣碎
2. 所有材料加水煎煮
3. 煮20分钟后取汁
4. 睡前温服
5. 每日1次，连用5-7天
6. 注意：酸枣仁需炒制后使用

zh.text: 功效：补血安神，适合血虚型失眠。

zh.title: 桂圆红枣茶
zh.instructions:
1. 红枣去核切片
2. 所有材料放入杯中
3. 加沸水冲泡
4. 盖上盖子焖10分钟
5. 代茶饮用，每日1-2次
6. 可反复冲泡至味淡

zh.text: 功效：健脾养胃，适合脾胃不和型失眠。

zh.title: 小米山药粥
zh.instructions:
1. 山药去皮切块
2. 小米洗净加水煮粥
3. 加入山药、红枣
4. 煮至粘稠
5. 每晚食用
6. 小米有安神作用，适合晚餐

zh.text: 功效：滋阴润燥，适合阴虚火旺型失眠。

zh.title: 银耳百合汤
zh.instructions:
1. 银耳提前泡发撕成小朵
2. 百合洗净
3. 加水炖煮1小时
4. 加入枸杞、冰糖
5. 睡前1小时温服
6. 每周3-4次

items: 睡前不宜过饱，晚餐应在睡前2-3小时完成
避免睡前饮用咖啡、浓茶等刺激性饮品
食疗需要坚持，效果需要时间积累
配合良好的睡眠习惯效果更佳
严重失眠应及时就医

zh.text: 温馨提示：食疗方仅供参考，不能替代医疗治疗。长期失眠或严重失眠者应咨询专业医师，找出失眠的根本原因进行针对性治疗。

en.text: Insomnia is a common modern problem. TCM believes insomnia relates to restless spirit, excessive liver fire, or disharmony between spleen and stomach. Dietary therapy can fundamentally improve sleep quality. Here are 5 effective insomnia recipes:
TCM calls insomnia 'bu mei', main causes include:

items: Restless spirit: Insufficient heart blood, spirit lacks nourishment
Excessive liver fire: Liver stagnation transforms to fire, disturbs spirit
Spleen-stomach disharmony: Stomach Qi disharmony causes restless sleep
Yin deficiency with fire: Insufficient Yin fluids, deficient fire rises
Phlegm-heat disturbs heart: Internal phlegm-heat disturbs spirit

en.text: Recipe 1: Lily Bulb Lotus Seed Porridge
Benefits: Nourish heart, calm spirit - for heart blood deficiency insomnia.

en.title: Lily Lotus Porridge
en.instructions:
1. Soak lily bulb and lotus seed
2. Wash rice, add water to make porridge
3. Add lily and lotus, continue cooking
4. Add rock sugar when thick
5. Eat 1 hour before bed
6. Continue 7-10 days for effect

en.text: Benefits: Nourish liver, calm heart - for liver blood deficiency insomnia.

en.title: Suanzaoren Soup
en.instructions:
1. Fry and crush sour jujube kernel
2. Add all ingredients, decoct
3. Boil 20 minutes, extract liquid
4. Drink warm before bed
5. Once daily, use 5-7 days
6. Note: Sour jujube kernel must be fried before use

en.text: Benefits: Tonify blood, calm spirit - for blood deficiency insomnia.

en.title: Longan Red Date Tea
en.instructions:
1. Remove date seeds, slice
2. Place all in cup
3. Add boiling water
4. Cover and steep 10 minutes
5. Drink as tea, 1-2 times daily
6. Can re-steep until flavor fades

en.text: Benefits: Strengthen spleen, nourish stomach - for spleen-stomach disharmony insomnia.

en.title: Millet Yam Porridge
en.instructions:
1. Peel yam, cut into chunks
2. Wash millet, add water for porridge
3. Add yam and dates
4. Cook until thick
5. Eat every evening
6. Millet calms spirit, ideal for dinner

en.text: Benefits: Nourish Yin, moisten dryness - for Yin deficiency fire insomnia.

en.title: Tremella Lily Soup
en.instructions:
1. Soak tremella, tear into pieces
2. Wash lily bulb
3. Simmer for 1 hour
4. Add goji and sugar
5. Drink warm 1 hour before bed
6. 3-4 times weekly

items: Don't eat too much before bed, dinner 2-3 hours before sleep
Avoid coffee, strong tea before bed
Dietary therapy needs consistency, effects take time
Combine with good sleep habits for better results
Seek medical care for severe insomnia

en.text: Note: Recipes are for reference only, not replacing medical treatment. Those with long-term or severe insomnia should consult a physician to identify root causes for targeted treatment.
